ford_transit_job_note_83aa36aea1.text: Transpondery confirms 4D60 for 2000-2006. Silca independently lists Transit V184/5 2000-2006 with FO21 and 433 MHz.

ford_transit_job_note_a709be6cde.text: Transpondery confirms DST80 for 2013-2016. Silca independently lists Transit 2013-2016 with HU101 and 433 MHz.

ford_transit_job_note_83092f4f79.text: Transpondery confirms Texas 4C for 1995-1999. The remote configuration varies, so frequency must be confirmed from the original key or exact application before supply.

ford_transit_job_note_4b47a60084.text: Transpondery confirms Texas 4C for 1995-1999. The remote configuration varies, so frequency must be confirmed from the original key or exact application before supply. Some key hardware varies within this year/build range. Confirm the original key, VIN and physical vehicle configuration before supply.

ford_transit_job_note_8a396d3d43.text: Transpondery lists 2007-2013 as Texas 4D63. Silca independently lists Transit V347 2006-2013 with FO21 and 433 MHz.

ford_transit_job_note_04bf218f8a.text: Transpondery lists 2007-2013 as Texas 4D63. Silca independently lists Transit V347 2006-2013 with FO21 and 433 MHz. Some key hardware varies within this year/build range. Confirm the original key, VIN and physical vehicle configuration before supply.

ford_transit_job_note_db85b8c890.text: Transpondery lists Transit 2016+ as Hitag Pro and publishes the OEM references shown. Silca independently lists Transit from 2016/2017 with HU101 and 433 MHz.

ford_transit_job_note_a5da3f7e43.text: Use only where passive start is physically confirmed. Key family and OEM references are source-backed; operation-level tool IDs remain to be mapped.

verification.notes: Duplicate wording is collapsed in this index. Each note remains traceable to the verified generation-specific records in models.json.
